channel.title: Passive Investing on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Passive Investing on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Personal Finance (4): Index Funds and ETFs — The Lazy Investor's Edge
item.description: I used to think investing meant picking stocks. You research companies, read annual reports, stare at candlestick charts, and somehow divine which ticker is going to double. Then I learned about index funds, and I felt genuinely annoyed that nobody told me sooner. Not annoyed at the concept — it’s beautifully simple — but annoyed at myself for spending mental cycles on stock-picking fantasies when the answer was hiding in plain sight.
